creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Please close this PR, yesterday's commit of www/eaccelerator now
results in the exact same version of eaccelerator.

On Fri, Mar 8, 2013 at 11:30 AM,  <FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org> wrote:
